enchantment.tacz_eo.bullseye.desc: Increases bullet damage when a headshot is landed.
enchantment.tacz_eo.bullet_retention.des: Chance to not consume bullets when firing weapons.
config.tacz_eo.title: TACZ - Enchantment Overhaul Config
config.tacz_eo.category.enchantment_bala: Settings related to balancing the enchantments added by this mod.
config.tacz_eo.option.base_enchantabilit: The minimum enchantability required to obtain the first level of the enchantment.
config.tacz_eo.option.level_enchantabili: The additional enchantability required for each subsequent level of the enchantment.
config.tacz_eo.option.enchantability_spa: When added to the base and level enchantability, this value determines the maximum enchantability where the enchantment can be obtained.
config.tacz_eo.category.enchantment_bala: Increases bullet damage based on the enchantment level when a headshot is landed.
Increases bullet armour penetration based on the enchantment level.
Increases bullet damage based on the enchantment level.
Reduces bullet spread based on the enchantment level.
Increases bullet penetration through entities based on the enchantment level.
Increases magazine capacity based on the enchantment level.
Chance to not consume bullets when firing weapons based on the enchantment level.
config.tacz_eo.category.allow.tooltip: Settings related to which weapons can use various which enchantments.
config.tacz_eo.category.allow.group.list: A list of the enchantments that all guns can accept. This is checked before the blacklist.
config.tacz_eo.category.allow.info: Gun blacklists for the above enchantments.
config.tacz_eo.option.enchantment_blackl: Guns that cannot be enchanted with %s. Use the format 'packid:gunid' to specify items. Example: 'tacz:aug'. This must be done from within a world or no guns will be suggested.
